# Summary

DeFiCarrot addressed multiple issues following a Drift protocol exploit. Jupiter Exchange router problems affecting ONyc position closures on Boost were resolved. The exploit caused ~50% losses for CRT holders (adjusted price ~$57.65). Carrot paused mint/redeem functions pending clarity; Boost and Turbo products remain unaffected. All funds stayed secure.

Thanks for bearing with us

If you still have issues please open a ticket in discord and we’ll assist.

Without imagery, context about scope/timeline, or a clear call-to-action, it reads more like an internal status update than a compelling community alert.
